home.intro: Check a server's TLS/SSL configuration — certificates, protocols, ciphers and known vulnerabilities. Enter host and port, choose the scan type and start. The scan may take up to 5 minutes.
home.scanCertOnly: Fast scan: Server defaults and certificate (expiry and chain)
home.scanCertOnlyTooltip: Checks server defaults (protocols and ciphers offered) and certificate validity and chain. Fast scan, no vulnerability tests.
home.scanNormal: Normal scan: Protocols, ciphers and certificate
home.scanNormalTooltip: Checks TLS protocols, cipher suites and certificate. Includes basic security checks. Recommended for most uses.
home.scanFull: Full scan: Vulnerability checks (may trigger IDS)
home.scanFullTooltip: Includes all normal scan tests plus known vulnerability checks (e.g. POODLE, BEAST). These checks may be detected by intrusion detection systems (IDS) and your IP may be blocked or logged.
home.confirmLabel: I confirm that I am authorized to scan this system
home.confirmNotice: Your IP may be logged by intrusion detection systems.

result.title: Result
result.streamError: Could not connect to the scan output. The scan may still be running. Refresh the page to try again or go back.

about.title: About
about.intro: This portal allows you to check servers' TLS/SSL configuration using testssl.sh.

errors.confirmRequired: You must confirm that you are authorized to scan this system.
